notes: Full month Jarvis AI product campaign. 🦞 = OpenClaw/Jarvis identity. 🤖 = Claude AI power. Morning posts are pre-planned; evenings auto-generate from standard calendar.

plan.headline: 10 agents. One install.
plan.caption: One install. 10 specialist AI agents running daily. Each one focused on a different part of your business. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: Jarvis runs 10 specialist AI agents inside a single install. Lead follow-up, Instagram content, SEO monitoring, Google Ads, email triage, morning digest, content writing, customer success, builder and analyst agents. All of them running automatically every day from your own computer. Link in bio. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: It posts for you
plan.caption: Jarvis generates and posts your Instagram content twice a day at the best times for your audience. On-brand, every time. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Jarvis generates branded Instagram carousels, stories and reels daily, then posts them at peak engagement times for your audience. Every post matches your brand colours, fonts and tone. You review if you want, or just let it run. Link in bio. 🦞

plan.headline: What AI looks like in 2026
plan.caption: Jarvis is not another SaaS tool. It lives on your machine, costs $5 a month in API usage, and has no ongoing subscription. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: Most AI tools are cloud subscriptions that start at $50 a month. Jarvis is different. It installs on your computer like regular software, uses the Anthropic API at your own cost ($5 to $20 a month depending on usage), and has zero subscription fees. You own it. It runs locally. Your data stays private. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: Step one: download it
plan.caption: Step one of setting up Jarvis takes two minutes. The installer handles everything. No terminal. No developer. Just click. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Setting up Jarvis starts with a single download. Run the installer on Mac or Windows and it handles every dependency automatically. No command line, no developer, no tech knowledge required. Two minutes later, the setup wizard opens in your browser. Link in bio. 🦞

plan.headline: Step two: the wizard
plan.caption: The setup wizard walks you through every step. Business name, email, API key. 10 minutes total. Then Jarvis runs forever. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: Once the installer finishes, a setup wizard opens in your browser. It walks you through entering your business name, connecting your Gmail, and adding your Anthropic API key. We show you exactly where to get the key. Total setup time: around 10 minutes. After that, Jarvis runs automatically every day. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: Your 7am briefing
plan.caption: Jarvis sends you a morning digest at 7am. Leads replied to, posts published, site health checked. Before your first coffee. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Every morning at 7am Jarvis sends you a digest of exactly what happened overnight. Leads that came in and got replied to, Instagram posts that went live, your site speed scores, and what the agents have planned for today. You get the summary, Jarvis does the work. 🦞

plan.headline: Tradies miss leads too
plan.caption: Tradies miss leads every day because they are on the job. Jarvis replies to enquiries so you never lose a job to voicemail again. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Plumbers, builders, electricians and landscapers are on the tools all day. They cannot answer every call or reply to every enquiry straight away. That costs them jobs. Jarvis monitors the enquiry inbox and sends a professional reply within minutes, any time, any day. Link in bio. 🦞

plan.headline: Clinics need leads too
plan.caption: Clinics, physios and allied health practices lose bookings every day to slow follow-up. Jarvis replies to every enquiry within minutes. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Healthcare practices lose bookings when enquiries go unanswered for even a few hours. Patients book with whoever responds first. Jarvis monitors your enquiry inbox around the clock and sends a professional reply within minutes of every new message, so your practice is always first to respond. 🦞

plan.headline: Running before breakfast
plan.caption: Before you have had your first coffee, Jarvis has already worked two hours. Lead replies, social content, site monitoring. All done. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: By the time you wake up, Jarvis has already been running for hours. Lead enquiries have been replied to, an Instagram post is live, your site health has been checked, and your morning digest is waiting in your inbox. That is what running an AI-powered business actually looks like. 🦞🤖

slides: You do not know how to fix it

plan.headline: Stop missing jobs
plan.caption: Jarvis is live at improveyoursite.com/jarvis. 10 minutes to set up. No subscription. No tech skills needed. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: Every day you wait is another day of leads going unanswered, social posts not going out, and Google not finding your site. Jarvis runs all of it from your computer for a one-time $30 download. No subscription. No tech skills required. Get it at improveyoursite.com/jarvis. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: Your data stays yours
plan.caption: Unlike cloud AI tools, Jarvis runs locally on your own computer. Your business data never leaves your machine. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: Every SaaS tool you use stores your data on someone else's servers. Jarvis is different. It installs on your own computer and runs locally. The only external call is to the Anthropic API to process AI requests, which is the same as using any other AI tool. Your lead data, email content, and business information stay on your machine. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: One month running Jarvis
plan.caption: This is what one month with Jarvis looks like. Consistent output, zero admin. From $30 at improveyoursite.com/jarvis. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: After one month running Jarvis, your business has had every lead replied to within minutes, Instagram content posted twice daily, SEO alerts flagged weekly, and Google Ads monitored every morning. All of that running in the background while you focused on the actual work. That is the Jarvis difference. Link in bio. 🦞
